rule_d_compliance: Did not read iter_2, iter_3, or iter_4 prior artifacts. Did not read step_06_audit.md, step_07_export.md, audit/ or checkpoints/ directories. Did not read any *.pre_r9.bak files. narrative: All 10 sampled pages PASS JP OCR fidelity audit. Three exam pages (205, 226, 331) have correct answer_index values verified against OCR answer-key lines. Two chapter-title pages (265, 287) correctly emit only chapter entities. Three content pages (247, 297, 357, 359) have table cells and term definitions that match OCR source verbatim or are valid distillations. Page 274 used cleaned source and both extracted terms are faithful. The only recurring issue is Mistral's misread of the '試験にはコレが出る！' callout (appearing as 'つなが出る！' or 'つしが出る！' in ocr/), but in all cases the garbled text was correctly suppressed at Stage 4 and did not reach structured/ or output/.
